title: Why Do Analysts See 180%+ Upside for Allogene Therapeutics (ALLO)?
text: Analyst Upside Expectations for Allogene Therapeutics (ALLO). As of April 8, 2026, analyst sentiment toward Allogene remains decidedly positive. Consensus price target of $7.50 implies 186.26% upside. Analyst Activity: Piper Sandler increased price target from $7 to $8 in March 2026, kept Overweight rating. Analysts believe focus will shift toward ALPHA3 interim analysis results. Clinical Catalyst: Management characterized ALPHA3 as pivotal. Following Q4 2025 earnings, executives called it a significant turning point for allogeneic CAR-T adoption beyond academic centers. Financial Position: $258.3M in cash, equivalents, and investments. Runway into Q1 2028. Operating expenses projected at $150M for 2026.
